ReleaseMultipleInstanceByPost.instanceIds: List of instance IDs, up to 100 elements
ReleaseMultipleInstanceByPost.relatedReleaseFlag: Whether to also release pay-per-use EIPs (EIPs in shared bandwidth will be unbound automatically and do not support associated release) and pay-per-use data disks attached to the instance at the time of release; deleteCdsSnapshotFlag is only effective when this field is true
ReleaseMultipleInstanceByPost.deleteCdsSnapshotFlag: Whether to release cloud disk snapshots
ReleaseMultipleInstanceByPost.deleteRelatedEnisFlag: Whether to delete associated ENIs when the instance is released
ReleaseMultipleInstanceByPost.bccRecycleFlag: Whether to move the instance to the recycle bin upon release
